lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh
lint.observation: All four docs/governance validators passed: knowledgebase-lint OK, enterprise-policy OK, architecture-check OK, orchestrator-layer OK

typecheck.observation: Maven compile succeeded with exit code 0

test.command: N/A - docs-only milestone, no runtime tests needed
test.observation: Docs-only milestone, test suite not required for validation

nonBlockingIssues.description: exports-and-approvals.md: Export download path documented as GET /api/v1/exports/download/{requestId} but actual OpenAPI path is GET /api/v1/exports/{requestId}/download (segment order differs). Pre-existing inaccuracy not caught by the fix.

exports-and-approvals.md: Export request flow summary still references 'Poll for export completion status' but there is no status polling endpoint. Flow summary should reflect the actual workflow (request → retry download).

exports-and-approvals.md and dto-examples.md: ExportRequestCreateRequest.parameters typed as string in OpenAPI but shown as JSON object in docs examples. Should be documented as a stringified JSON or the actual behavior clarified.
exports-and-approvals.md: POST /api/v1/sales/orders/{orderId}/request-approval does not exist in OpenAPI spec. Pre-existing inaccuracy not part of original blocking issues.
dto-examples.md: Markdown code block for 'List Invoices' at line 158 is never closed — formatting artifact introduced by the fix when POST /api/v1/invoices section was removed.
dto-examples.md: GET /api/v1/dealers/101 shown as example but OpenAPI only has PUT on /api/v1/dealers/{dealerId} — no GET method on individual dealer path. Pre-existing inaccuracy.
dto-examples.md line 273: Approval endpoint listed as POST but actual OpenAPI method is PUT for export approval. Minor HTTP method inaccuracy.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that docs-worker must verify ALL documented API endpoint paths and request/response schemas against openapi.json before writing them as canonical mainline behavior — not just the paths flagged in review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix feature correctly addressed the 4 flagged blocking issues but left 7 non-blocking residual inaccuracies in the same files. The worker only fixed the specific issues raised rather than doing a comprehensive openapi.json reconciliation pass across all endpoints in each file.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that when creating new canonical docs that supersede earlier models, the worker should also update docs/INDEX.md and cross-links to prevent silent duplication between old and new models.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features docs-mainline-frontend-portals-foundation and docs-mainline-shared-api-and-auth-scope both created new canonical docs structures without updating docs/INDEX.md. The old frontend-handoff-*.md files still appear as the canonical handoff model. This was flagged as non-blocking in round 1.
